questions.objective_ref: LO1 — Define automation complacency in plain language and distinguish it from general inattention
LO2 — Explain the accuracy paradox: why a highly accurate system makes the humans watching it less safe
LO3 — Trace the causal chain: high accuracy → reduced vigilance → missed failure
LO4 — Identify vigilance decay in a described scenario and state when it is most dangerous
LO5 — Connect automation complacency to override-as-theater from topic 10.1
LO6 — Name two real-world domains where automation complacency is documented and describe a consequence in each
LO5 (extended) — Connect automation complacency to override-as-theater in a scenario, with depth
